2605.10541.title: Bridging Sequence and Graph Structure for Epigenetic Age Prediction
2605.10541.paper_summary: Epigenetic clocks based on DNA methylation have emerged as powerful tools for estimating biological age, with broad applications in aging research, age-related disease studies, and longevity science. Despite advances across machine learning approaches to epigenetic age prediction, spanning penalised linear regression, deep feedforward networks, residual architectures, and graph neural networks, no existing method jointly models co-methylation graph structure and site-specific DNA sequence context within a unified framework. We propose a unified sequence--graph integration framework for epigenetic age prediction that addresses this gap, integrating eight-dimensional DNA sequence statistical features through a lightweight gated modulation mechanism that adaptively scales each site's methylation signal according to its sequence-determined biological relevance prior to graph convolution. Evaluated on 3,707 blood methylation samples against a comprehensive set of baselines, our method achieves a test MAE of 3.149 years, a 12.8\% improvement over the strongest graph-based baseline. Biologically informed statistical features outperform CNN-based sequence encoding, demonstrating that handcrafted sequence features are more effective than end-to-end learned representations in this data regime. Post-hoc interpretability analysis identifies CpG density and local adenine frequency as features with age-dependent importance shifts, consistent with known mechanisms of age-related hypermethylation at CpG-dense promoter regions. Our code is at https://github.com/yaoli2022/graphage-seq.
2605.10541.paper_summary_zh: 基於DNA甲基化的表觀遺傳時鐘已成為估算生物年齡的強大工具，廣泛應用於衰老研究、與年齡相關的疾病研究和長壽科學。儘管在表觀遺傳年齡預測方面的機器學習方法取得了進展，包括懲罰性線性回歸、深度前饋網絡、殘差架構和圖神經網絡，但目前尚無方法能在統一框架內共同建模共甲基化圖結構和特定位點的DNA序列上下文。我們提出了一個統一的序列-圖整合框架，用於表觀遺傳年齡預測，填補了這一空白，通過一種輕量級的門控調制機制整合八維DNA序列統計特徵，根據每個位點的序列決定的生物學相關性自適應地調整其甲基化信號，然後進行圖卷積。在3,707個血液甲基化樣本上進行評估，與一組全面的基準進行比較，我們的方法實現了3.149年的測試MAE，比最強的基於圖的基準提高了12.8\%。生物學上知情的統計特徵超越了基於CNN的序列編碼，證明在這一數據範疇中，手工製作的序列特徵比端到端學習的表示更有效。事後可解釋性分析確定了CpG密度和局部腺苷頻率作為隨年齡變化的重要性特徵，這與已知的在CpG密集啟動子區域的年齡相關超甲基化機制一致。我們的代碼位於 https://github.com/yaoli2022/graphage-seq。
2605.10541.author: Yao Li et.al.
2605.10541.authors: Yao Li, Xikun Zhang, Xiaotao Shen, Sonika Tyagi, Xin Zheng, Jiaxing Huang, Feng Xia
